creator: twiser@orchidit.com
text:
Hi,

I am trying to install 8.1 from the DVD ISO download into a Hyper-V
virtual machine.  Whilst the DVD boots and I can traverse the menus
(configure the disk, select the ports etc), the actual installation
is failing with a "device not defined or unavailable" error.  The system
then reboots automatically.

Booting the disc into the non-ACPI mode seems to get a bit further but
then the installer gets to a stage where it appears unable to write data
to the disk.

Cheers,
Tim.
